title: Add 'huzluxe.in' website domain display to the site

requirements.summary: Display the website domain 'huzluxe.in' as a clickable link in a prominent location styled with the dark charcoal and warm amber design system
acceptanceCriteria: The text 'huzluxe.in' is visible on the site in at least one location
The domain is rendered as a clickable link pointing to https://huzluxe.in
The domain display is styled consistently with the dark charcoal and warm amber design system
The placement does not disrupt existing layout or navigation

file_operations.description: Add a domain badge displaying 'huzluxe.in' as a clickable link next to the HUZLUXE logo in the navigation bar. Style it with amber-colored text and a subtle border to complement the existing dark charcoal background. Ensure the badge is visible on both desktop and mobile viewports and maintains the existing navigation scroll behavior and active section highlighting.

Add the 'huzluxe.in' domain as a clickable link in the contact information section alongside the existing contact details (email, phone, location). Style it consistently with the amber accent color and include an appropriate icon (e.g., globe or link icon). Ensure it appears in the contact info cards grid without disrupting the existing mailto functionality or form layout.
